name: Taberna da Rua das Flores
description: A beloved hole-in-the-wall tavern near Chiado with a blackboard menu that changes daily. Tiny interior, communal tables, incredible petiscos (Portuguese tapas). Authentic, honest food using whatever the market had that morning.

name: Solar dos Presuntos
description: Institution since 1974. Famous for cured meats, bacalhau, and other hearty Portuguese classics. Large, lively dining room adorned with azulejo tiles. Excellent for groups and those wanting a classic Lisbon experience.

name: Belcanto
description: Two Michelin stars. Chef José Avillez's flagship restaurant is a masterpiece of contemporary Portuguese fine dining. Seasonal tasting menus with wine pairings. The most special dining experience in Lisbon — reserve months in advance.

name: O Corvo
description: Tiny neighbourhood tasca off the beaten tourist path. Unfussy, brilliant value, beloved by locals. The bacalhau com natas and grilled sardines are outstanding. No frills, no pretension, all soul.

name: Pharmácia
description: Set in a former pharmacy on a hilltop with sweeping views of the Tagus. The theme is playful — medicines repurposed as starters, potions as cocktails. Stunning terrace for sunset drinks. Great for couples.

name: A Cevicheria
description: Buzzy, modern spot in Príncipe Real famous for its ceviche and creative fish dishes. The octopus hanging from the ceiling is an icon. Lively atmosphere, creative cocktails, no reservations for small groups.

name: Ao 26 Vegan Food Project
description: The best plant-based restaurant in Lisbon. Creative vegan takes on Portuguese classics in a relaxed, colourful setting in Príncipe Real. Great for vegetarians and vegans who don't want to compromise on flavour.

name: Tasca do Chico
description: Intimate fado restaurant in the heart of Alfama. Live fado performances while you eat traditional Portuguese food. Small, atmospheric, and deeply Lisbon. Book well in advance — only 20 covers. A true bucket-list experience.
vibe: romantic, authentic, fado, intimate, special occasion
